title: analytics schema overview
text:
# Schema: analytics

Contains 10 base tables, 2 views, 3 RPC functions, 2 enum types.

## Tables

- **alert_history** (table, 8 cols) PK:id FK:alert_rule_id,resolved_by →alert_rules,users
- **alert_rules** (table, 12 cols) PK:id FK:owner_id →users ←alert_history
- **audit_logs** (table, 13 cols) PK:id FK:user_id →users
- **dashboard_widgets** (table, 10 cols) PK:id FK:dashboard_id →dashboards
- **dashboards** (table, 9 cols) PK:id FK:owner_id,organization_id →users,organizations ←dashboard_widgets
- **events** (table, 12 cols) PK:id FK:actor_id →users
- **metrics** (table, 7 cols) PK:id
- **notifications** (table, 11 cols) PK:id FK:user_id →users
- **recent_events** (view, 8 cols)
- **report_executions** (table, 12 cols) PK:id FK:report_id,executed_by →reports,users
- **reports** (table, 12 cols) PK:id FK:owner_id,organization_id →users,organizations ←report_executions
- **unread_notifications** (view, 8 cols)

## Enums

- **event_severity**: debug | info | warning | error | critical
- **report_type**: daily | weekly | monthly | quarterly | annual | custom

## RPC Functions

- **dashboard_count**() → integer
- **event_count_by_severity**(p_severity text) → integer
- **unread_notification_count**(p_user_id uuid) → integer

title: catalog schema overview
text:
# Schema: catalog

Contains 11 base tables, 0 views, 3 RPC functions, 2 enum types.

## Tables

- **brands** (table, 9 cols) PK:id FK:organization_id →organizations ←products
- **categories** (table, 10 cols) PK:id FK:parent_id ←products
- **collection_products** (table, 6 cols) PK:id FK:collection_id,product_id →collections,products
- **collections** (table, 11 cols) PK:id FK:created_by →users ←collection_products
- **price_history** (table, 8 cols) PK:id FK:product_id,changed_by →products,users
- **product_media** (table, 11 cols) PK:id FK:product_id →products
- **product_reviews** (table, 11 cols) PK:id FK:product_id,user_id →products,users
- **product_tags** (table, 4 cols) PK:product_id,tag_id FK:product_id,tag_id →products,tags
- **product_variants** (table, 10 cols) PK:id FK:product_id →products
- **products** (table, 22 cols) PK:id FK:brand_id,category_id,created_by,updated_by →brands,categories,users,users ←collection_products,price_history,product_media,product_reviews,product_tags,product_variants
- **tags** (table, 4 cols) PK:id ←product_tags

## Enums

- **media_type**: image | video | document | audio | 3d_model

## RPC Functions

- **count_active_products**() → integer
- **products_by_category**(p_category_id uuid) → integer

text:
# Schema: logistics

Contains 11 base tables, 0 views, 2 RPC functions, 2 enum types.

## Tables

- **inventory** (table, 13 cols) PK:id FK:product_id,variant_id,warehouse_id,bin_id →products,product_variants,warehouses,storage_bins ←stock_movements
- **purchase_order_items** (table, 9 cols) PK:id FK:purchase_order_id,product_id →purchase_orders,products
- **purchase_orders** (table, 14 cols) PK:id FK:supplier_id,warehouse_id,created_by,approved_by →suppliers,warehouses,users,users ←purchase_order_items
- **shipment_items** (table, 6 cols) PK:id FK:shipment_id,order_item_id →shipments,order_items
- **shipment_tracking** (table, 8 cols) PK:id FK:shipment_id →shipments
- **shipments** (table, 14 cols) PK:id FK:order_id,warehouse_id →orders,warehouses ←shipment_items,shipment_tracking
- **stock_movements** (table, 10 cols) PK:id FK:inventory_id,performed_by →inventory,users
- **storage_bins** (table, 8 cols) PK:id FK:zone_id →storage_zones ←inventory
- **storage_zones** (table, 9 cols) PK:id FK:warehouse_id →warehouses ←storage_bins
- **suppliers** (table, 11 cols) PK:id ←purchase_orders
- **warehouses** (table, 10 cols) PK:id FK:organization_id,manager_id →organizations,users ←inventory,purchase_orders,shipments,storage_zones

## Enums

- **shipment_status**: preparing | picked_up | in_transit | out_for_delivery | delivered | returned | lost

Go struct: AlertHistory. TypeScript: AlertHistory.
Columns: 8, PKs: 1, FKs: 2, UKs: 0.

1. id — SQL:uuid Go:uuid.UUID TS:string NOT NULL, default=gen_random_uuid()

3. alert_rule_id — SQL:uuid Go:uuid.UUID TS:string NOT NULL →refs:alert_rules(alert_history_alert_rule_id_fkey)

5. resolved — SQL:boolean Go:bool TS:boolean NOT NULL, default=false
6. resolved_at — SQL:timestamp with time zone Go:time.Time TS:string NULLABLE

8. created_at — SQL:timestamp with time zone Go:time.Time TS:string NOT NULL, default=now()

## Relationships

- PARENT: analytics.alert_history.alert_rule_id → alert_rules.alert_history_alert_rule_id_fkey
- PARENT: analytics.alert_history.resolved_by → users.alert_history_resolved_by_fkey

Preloads: AlertRuleIdDetail, AlertRuleIdDetail.AlertHistoryList, AlertRuleIdDetail.AlertHistoryList.AlertRuleIdDetail

# Permissions REST API

Base: /api/v1/permissions. Auth: Authorization + x-company headers.

GET /api/v1/permissions/  — Search. Params: size, sort, fields, preloads, filters.
POST /api/v1/permissions/search  — Search (POST body).
GET /api/v1/permissions/pagination  — Paginated. Params: page, size, sort, fields, preloads.
POST /api/v1/permissions/pagination  — Paginated (POST body).
POST /api/v1/permissions/  — Create. Body: PermissionsForm.
POST /api/v1/permissions/bulk/  — Bulk create. Body: PermissionsForm[].
GET /api/v1/permissions/with-id/{Id}  — FindById.
PUT /api/v1/permissions/with-id/{Id}  — Update. Body: PermissionsEdit.

DELETE /api/v1/permissions/with-id/{Id}  — Soft-delete.

### Permissions (model)
- id: string
- name: string
- resource: string
- action: string
- description: string
- createdAt: string
- updatedAt: string

- name: string (required: yes)
- resource: string (required: no)
- action: string (required: no)
- description: string (required: no)

- description?: string
